properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus, Lord of Heaven I do not deserve The grace that You have given Or the promise of Your word Lord, I stand in wonder At the sacrifice You made With mercy beyond measure My debt You freely paid

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Your love is deeper than any ocean Higher than the heavens Reaches beyond the stars in the sky Jesus, Your love has no bounds Jesus, Your love has no bounds

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus, Lord of Heaven I do not deserve The grace that You have given Or the promise of Your word Lord, I stand in wonder At the sacrifice You made With mercy beyond measure My debt You freely paid

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Your love is deeper than any ocean Higher than the heavens Reaches beyond the stars in the sky

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Your love is deep, Your love is wide Your love is great, Your love is high Your love is all we ever need Your love is all we ever need

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Your love is deeper than any ocean Higher than the heavens Reaches beyond the stars in the sky Your love is deeper than any ocean Higher than the heavens Reaches beyond the stars in the sky Jesus, Your love has no bounds Jesus, Your love has no bounds
